title: Prepared food planner entries with immutable product nutrition pins
summary: 완제품을 Recipe Meal과 분리해 날짜·끼니에 수량으로 추가하고 생성 순간 immutable nutrition version과 이름·브랜드를 pin하며, 기존 planner/meals read model에는 중복 없는 additive product_entries로 제공한다.
goal: 사용자가 public 또는 본인 private 완제품을 플래너에 안전하게 추가·수정·삭제하되 과거 nutrition pin과 기존 Recipe Meal shopping/cooking/leftover/status/XP workflow가 흔들리지 않게 한다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; the global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: fresh role-separated Codex tasks own Stage 1 docs, independent Stage 1.5 review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend TDD, independent Stage 3 review, Stage 4 frontend, authority precheck, Stage 5 and final authority, and Stage 6; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: prepared-food-catalog PR #1015 merged at b095f257a9a99f0f4952029ffd11a1036104f40f and provides owner-only private products plus immutable nutrition versions
05-planner-week-core is merged and provides recipe-only Meal planner columns and read foundations
nutrition products planner contract is locked in official requirements v1.7.20 screen v1.5.26 flow v1.3.23 database v1.3.21 and API v1.2.25
independent fresh Codex Stage 1.5 approval is required before Stage 2 starts
out_of_scope: GET planner nutrition and meal day week planned nutrition aggregation
Prepared food catalog write implementation public importer operator CLI seed runtime provider lookup or promotion
Product workflow status recipe ID shopping list ID cooked at or leftover dish ID fields
Product entry through POST meals or fake Recipe Meal creation
Actual consumption eaten skipped medical disease coaching and goal attainment
OCR barcode dining out meal kit generic preparation size edible fields
Relation chaining cross-product cross-version name brand generic density or arbitrary gram milliliter inference
Any undocumented endpoint status error code request response field workflow status or database surface
notes: Stage 1 docs remains the current repository roadmap state and the full workflow lifecycle remains in_progress. The first independent Stage 1.5 review at b137aa4e9d090827a80301ab47cc55710821a166 recorded Blocker/Important/Suggestion 0/6/0; one separate repair-final pass closed all six findings, and the fresh independent exact-head re-review approved fe210b7169094edc77b64e91a730d86720d598ae with DOC_GATE_APPROVED and 0/0/0. That exact head had 7 successful current-head checks, 5 intended docs skips, and 0 pending/fail checks. approval_state=codex_approved and verification_status=passed describe only the Stage 1 design-contract/docs gate; Stage 4 evidence, authority precheck, Stage 5, final authority, and Stage 6 remain pending, so Design Status stays temporary and the slice is not complete or auto-merge eligible. Exactly three mutation routes plus existing GET /planner and GET /meals additive product_entries are locked; recipe-only meals/items and old clients remain compatible and duplicate rows are forbidden. Create atomically pins the current immutable product nutrition version and name/brand snapshot, patch changes only quantity using the old pinned relation, and soft-deleted new create returns PRODUCT_DELETED while existing pins remain. Same-unit or exactly one direct pinned relation is allowed; inference and missing-as-zero are forbidden. MEAL_SCREEN expected energy uses the pinned entry quantity and preserves partial/unavailable/missing-not-zero. FOOD_PRODUCT_PICKER consumes the existing opaque cursor API with reset/dedupe/last-page/latest-query guards. The isolated DB plan uses the real ensureUserBootstrapState path and explicit cleanup. Product entries remain outside Meal status, shopping, cooking, leftovers, recipe counts, planner_registered XP, and meal_add_path_used activity. Current approved public artifacts and operational public rows are zero, synthetic public fixtures are isolated-only, and production/staging writes stay zero. PLANNER_WEEK, MEAL_SCREEN, and MENU_ADD require before+after at 390/320/desktop; picker/create require after evidence. Docs PR #1016 merge, full repository migration/Supabase/PostgREST equivalence, physical-device/screen-reader review, future public promotion, and production-scale contention/query plans remain Manual Only or later-stage work.
